qualityPolicy.notes: Checklist B (serial #8) continues guarded fast mode and applies denser D-round literal routing while preserving unattended safety budget

executionHints.description: Checklist B (serial #8) assumes A is completed and keeps A->B serial accumulation with state-only reset

d1ResetRequirement.notes: When run range includes D1, use explicit reset to avoid stale code-step invocation state

D1.description: Introduce class-name literal helpers and route set_allocated_hint plus class-name mapping through helper-backed literals

operations.pattern:
static void wc_preclass_set_allocated_hint\(const char\* normalized,?
		const char\*\* cls,?
		const char\*\* rir,?
		const char\*\* reason,?
		const char\*\* confidence\)?
\{?
	const char\* guessed_rir = wc_guess_rir\(normalized\);?
	if \(guessed_rir && strcmp\(guessed_rir, "unknown"\) != 0\) \{?
		\*cls = "allocated";?
		\*rir = guessed_rir;?
		\*reason = "RIR_HINT_FROM_EXISTING_GUESS";?
		\*confidence = "medium";?
		return;?
	\}?
	\*cls = "unknown";?
	\*rir = "unknown";?
	\*reason = "NO_RIR_HINT";?
	\*confidence = "low";?
\}

static const char\* wc_preclass_class_name\(uint8_t class_id\)?
\{?
	switch \(class_id\) \{?
		case 0u: return "unknown";?
		case 1u: return "allocated";?
		case 2u: return "legacy";?
		case 3u: return "reserved";?
		case 4u: return "special";?
		case 5u: return "unallocated";?
		default: return "unknown";?
	\}?
\}

D2.description: Introduce RIR literal helpers and route set_allocated_hint plus rir-name mapping through helper-backed literals

operations.pattern:
static void wc_preclass_set_allocated_hint\(const char\* normalized,?
		const char\*\* cls,?
		const char\*\* rir,?
		const char\*\* reason,?
		const char\*\* confidence\)?
\{?
	const char\* guessed_rir = wc_guess_rir\(normalized\);?
	if \(guessed_rir && strcmp\(guessed_rir, "unknown"\) != 0\) \{?
		\*cls = wc_preclass_class_allocated_literal\(\);?
		\*rir = guessed_rir;?
		\*reason = "RIR_HINT_FROM_EXISTING_GUESS";?
		\*confidence = "medium";?
		return;?
	\}?
	\*cls = wc_preclass_class_unknown_literal\(\);?
	\*rir = "unknown";?
	\*reason = "NO_RIR_HINT";?
	\*confidence = "low";?
\}

static const char\* wc_preclass_rir_name\(uint8_t rir_id\)?
\{?
	switch \(rir_id\) \{?
		case 0u: return "unknown";?
		case 1u: return "none";?
		case 2u: return "apnic";?
		case 3u: return "arin";?
		case 4u: return "ripe";?
		case 5u: return "afrinic";?
		case 6u: return "lacnic";?
		default: return "unknown";?
	\}?
\}

D3.description: Introduce confidence literal helpers and route set_allocated_hint plus confidence-name mapping through helper-backed literals

operations.pattern:
static void wc_preclass_set_allocated_hint\(const char\* normalized,?
		const char\*\* cls,?
		const char\*\* rir,?
		const char\*\* reason,?
		const char\*\* confidence\)?
\{?
	const char\* guessed_rir = wc_guess_rir\(normalized\);?
	if \(guessed_rir && strcmp\(guessed_rir, wc_preclass_rir_unknown_literal\(\)\) != 0\) \{?
		\*cls = wc_preclass_class_allocated_literal\(\);?
		\*rir = guessed_rir;?
		\*reason = "RIR_HINT_FROM_EXISTING_GUESS";?
		\*confidence = "medium";?
		return;?
	\}?
	\*cls = wc_preclass_class_unknown_literal\(\);?
	\*rir = wc_preclass_rir_unknown_literal\(\);?
	\*reason = "NO_RIR_HINT";?
	\*confidence = "low";?
\}

static const char\* wc_preclass_confidence_name\(uint8_t confidence_id\)?
\{?
	switch \(confidence_id\) \{?
		case 0u: return "low";?
		case 1u: return "medium";?
		case 2u: return "high";?
		default: return "low";?
	\}?
\}

D4.description: Introduce reason literal helpers and route set_allocated_hint plus reason-name fallback through helper-backed constants

operations.pattern:
static void wc_preclass_set_allocated_hint\(const char\* normalized,?
		const char\*\* cls,?
		const char\*\* rir,?
		const char\*\* reason,?
		const char\*\* confidence\)?
\{?
	const char\* guessed_rir = wc_guess_rir\(normalized\);?
	if \(guessed_rir && strcmp\(guessed_rir, wc_preclass_rir_unknown_literal\(\)\) != 0\) \{?
		\*cls = wc_preclass_class_allocated_literal\(\);?
		\*rir = guessed_rir;?
		\*reason = "RIR_HINT_FROM_EXISTING_GUESS";?
		\*confidence = wc_preclass_confidence_medium_literal\(\);?
		return;?
	\}?
	\*cls = wc_preclass_class_unknown_literal\(\);?
	\*rir = wc_preclass_rir_unknown_literal\(\);?
	\*reason = "NO_RIR_HINT";?
	\*confidence = wc_preclass_confidence_low_literal\(\);?
\}

static const char\* wc_preclass_reason_name\(uint16_t reason_id\)?
\{?
	switch \(reason_id\) \{?
		case 1001u: return "V4_ALLOCATED_REGISTRY";?
		case 1002u: return "V4_LEGACY_REGISTRY";?
		case 1003u: return "V4_RESERVED_REGISTRY";?
		case 1099u: return "V4_UNKNOWN_REGISTRY";?
		case 2001u: return "V6_GLOBAL_UNICAST_2000_3";?
		case 2002u: return "V6_UNIQUE_LOCAL_FC00_7";?
		case 2003u: return "V6_LINK_LOCAL_FE80_10";?
		case 2004u: return "V6_MULTICAST_FF00_8";?
		case 2005u: return "V6_RESERVED_IETF";?
		case 2099u: return "V6_UNKNOWN_REGISTRY";?
		default: return "PRECLASS_REASON_UNKNOWN";?
	\}?
\}
